meta.title: CreatorStack AI From GitHub Release
meta.author: Fellyph Cintra
meta.description: Installs the latest built CreatorStack AI release zip from GitHub.

siteOptions.blogdescription: Disposable WordPress site for plugin testing

steps.code:
<?php
require '/wordpress/wp-load.php';

if ( ! defined( 'WTTBA_VERSION' ) ) {
	throw new Exception( 'CreatorStack AI did not load.' );
}

if ( ! file_exists( WTTBA_PLUGIN_DIR . 'build/admin-videos.asset.php' ) ) {
	throw new Exception( 'CreatorStack AI release assets are missing.' );
}
